reasoning: The control SI-4 (18) focuses on monitoring system traffic and detecting covert exfiltration, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through network policies, audit logging, and admission controllers. NetworkPolicies can be used to monitor and control traffic flow within the cluster, while Kubernetes audit logs can capture and analyze traffic patterns. Admission controllers can be configured to enforce traffic monitoring policies.
title: System Monitoring | Analyze Traffic and Covert Exfiltration
